name: rss-monitor
description: MVP RSS monitoring platform bootstrap with API, scheduler, and worker runtimes.

scripts.smoke:stack:up: API_HOST_PORT=${SMOKE_API_HOST_PORT:-3300} POSTGRES_HOST_PORT=${SMOKE_POSTGRES_HOST_PORT:-56432} REDIS_HOST_PORT=${SMOKE_REDIS_HOST_PORT:-57379} SMOKE_MONITORING_PORT=${SMOKE_MONITORING_PORT:-4010} docker compose -p rss-monitor-smoke -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.smoke.yml up -d --build
scripts.smoke:stack:down: docker compose -p rss-monitor-smoke -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.smoke.yml down -v --remove-orphans
scripts.smoke:ci: sh -c 'npm run smoke:stack:up && npm run smoke:stack:run; status=$?; npm run smoke:stack:down; exit $status'
scripts.benchmark:stack:up: API_HOST_PORT=${BENCHMARK_API_HOST_PORT:-3400} POSTGRES_HOST_PORT=${BENCHMARK_POSTGRES_HOST_PORT:-57432} REDIS_HOST_PORT=${BENCHMARK_REDIS_HOST_PORT:-58379} SMOKE_MONITORING_PORT=${BENCHMARK_MONITORING_PORT:-4110} docker compose -p rss-monitor-benchmark -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.smoke.yml up -d --build
scripts.benchmark:stack:down: docker compose -p rss-monitor-benchmark -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.smoke.yml down -v --remove-orphans
scripts.benchmark:stage:100:safe: sh -c 'npm run benchmark:stack:up && npm run benchmark:stage:100; status=$?; npm run benchmark:stack:down; exit $status'
